idea-plugin.name: WA Inspired UI Theme
idea-plugin.description: A Wes Anderson-inspired pastel UI theme collection for JetBrains IDEs. Includes balanced and vibrant variants for both light and dark Islands UI.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• Added publishing metadata, release documentation, and plugin icon.
  • Aligned Java compatibility with IntelliJ 2025.3 requirements.
  • Fixed plugin compatibility descriptor generation for Marketplace validation.
  • Updated theme author attribution to Jan-Niklas Wortmann.
  • Renamed variants for clarity: Balanced and Vibrant.
